questions.question: What desert covers 130,000 square miles of Turkmenistan?
What Fiddler on the Roof song does Seinfeld's George Costanza whistle while posing as a neo-Nazi?
questions.answer: If I Were a Rich Man

questions.question: What was the lowest tax rate in U.S. history, in effect from 1913 to 1915?

What golfing feat did sportswriter Grantland Rice dub 'the impregnable quadrilateral'?
Who claimed he never asked 'Did you ever wonder?' in over 600 pieces on CBS?
